rules: Keep feed and Reels previews safe-for-feed.
Prefer profile funnel and compliant call-to-action language.
do: Use tasteful hooks and profile-first conversion.
Lead with visual storytelling and clean CTA.
Keep language brand-safe for discovery surfaces.
dont: Do not use explicit sexual wording in captions.
Do not promise prohibited content directly.
Do not use spammy engagement bait.
platforms.why: Discovery ranking and moderation are stricter on explicit phrasing, so compliant language increases reach stability.

rules: Use safe language and focus on story hooks.
Avoid explicit claims and sensitive wording.
do: Drive traffic through compliant profile prompts.
dont: Do not mention explicit transactions in caption.
Do not use policy-sensitive sexual phrases.
platforms.why: Short-form distribution rewards safe, engaging hooks while explicit wording can reduce recommendation depth.

rules: Use clear context and avoid spam formatting.
Prioritize concise statements and thread-friendly hooks.
Keep links contextual and avoid repetitive bait phrasing.
do: Pin best-performing posts for funnel continuity.
Pair concise CTA with thematic hashtags.
dont: Do not use repetitive spam-like copy.
Do not use misleading engagement bait.
Do not overload with irrelevant tags.
platforms.why: Signal quality and contextual relevance drive engagement more than aggressive promotional wording.

rules: Use context-aware titles and non-spam tone.
Keep self-promo balanced with community value.
do: Tailor language to each subreddit culture.
Provide context instead of hard-sell copy.
dont: Do not paste generic promo text everywhere.
Do not violate subreddit content constraints.
Do not force conversion-first copy in strict communities.
platforms.why: Community-fit language prevents moderation removals and increases sustained visibility.

rules: Keep acquisition channels compliant and brand-safe.
Use profile and bio bridges for conversion.
Align teaser messaging with posted content boundaries.
do: Use transparent CTA language for premium access.
Keep intent clear without policy-trigger wording.
Maintain consistency between teaser and destination.
dont: Do not use deceptive urgency spam.
Do not mismatch funnel messaging and landing offer.
platforms.why: Consistent, compliant funnel copy improves conversion while reducing account risk on acquisition channels.
